candidates.why: Best match for equity attributable to shareholders and preferable to Total Equity to avoid double counting with minority interest.

variables.notes: Prioritized shareholder-specific equity line over total equity per rule. Included 'Total Equity' as fallback priority label in case of label change across periods.
